basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ESIC. A total of 04 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation for reserved categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG
qualification.details: Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Orthopedics): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (General Medicine): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Eye): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Chest): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG.

salary_details.details: Full Time Specialist: Rs. 1,23,485/- (Consolidated) per month Part Time Specialist: Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours/week + Rs. 15,000/- emergency + Rs. 800/- per additional hour

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist
MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Orthopedics): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (General Medicine): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Eye): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Chest): MBBS and PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years experience or PG diploma with 5 years Experience in respective specialty after PG.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation for reserved categories as per rules.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Full Time Specialist: Rs. 1,23,485/- (Consolidated) per month Part Time Specialist: Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours/week + Rs. 15,000/- emergency + Rs. 800/- per additional hour

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Specialist posts is scheduled for 15 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue within the specified reporting time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Specialist posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years of experience, or a PG diploma with 5 years of experience in the respective specialty after PG.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Specialist posts is 69 years. Age relaxation will be provided for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Full Time and Part Time Specialists?
faq.answer: Full Time Specialists will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,23,485/- per month. Part Time Specialists will get Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours/week, plus additional allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this ESIC recruitment drive?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Full Time Specialist / Part Time Specialist positions across various specialties.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ESIC Specialist posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh, at the ESIC office. The exact address and pincode are 243502.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.
